programme.title: George Michael
programme.desc: George Michael winds down his 25 Live tour in his first-ever concert film, which finds the former Wham! leading man revisiting hits familiar and fresh in two sold-out shows at London's Earls Court. Michael's impeccable vocals take center stage, and his pop-song prowess is driven home with such classics as "Faith", "Freedom" and "One More Try". Even "Careless Whisper" gets a nod, as does the Police's "Roxanne".

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Dos amores
programme.desc: Sofía le dice a Demián que no puede corresponder su amor, pero él está dispuesto a pelear por ella. Antes de irse del pueblo, Rosario decide acompañar a Armando para abrir la caja fuerte de Fernando. Juan busca a Sofía, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Gran desesperación
programme.desc: Valeria le dice a Rocky que fue Luciana quien lo mandó golpear. Hugo intenta pasar la noche con Mili por la fuerza. Constancio y Luciana continúan teniendo encuentros a espaldas de Néstor y Andrea.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Un amor imposible
programme.desc: Sonia se sorprende tras enterarse que Graciela y David se casarán. Por otro lado, David habla con Luciana y le confiesa todo lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Manuel le recrimina a Rosario que haya mentido respecto a su lugar de origen. Matilde le dice que Rosario tiene derecho a guardar secretos. Manuel le dice a Antonia que le buscará casa en el pueblo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Con mucho temor
programme.desc: Maricruz le dice a Perico que podría tener un hijo sordomudo como su hermana José Antonio es llevado a su casa herido, Miguel y Esther se espantan al verlo así.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Chantaje
programme.desc: Rodrigo lleva a Clarita al pueblo para sorprender a Gaviota en su cumpleaños. Minerva comienza a sospechar que Aarón la engaña de nuevo y le exige volver a su casa o confesará todo lo que sabe sobre él.

programme.title: Teresa: Planes de destrucción
programme.desc: Aída planea comprar las acciones de Martín para hacer que Teresa y Arturo se queden en la calle. Cutberto decide irse a Zacatecas para alejarse de Juana.

programme.title: Rubí: Seducción
programme.desc: Los padres de Alejandro se dan cuenta de que el doctor Bermúdez le ha quitado el crédito de la investigación a su hijo. Genaro le pide a Luis regresar a México luego de encontrarse a los papás de Alejandro y ver la cercanía con Sofía.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Nandito duda de que María lo haya querido salvar y piensa que es una asesina. Soraya confronta a María en la cárcel para provocarla y acusarla de haberla querido matar también. María le reprocha a Luis Fernando su infidelidad.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: La compañera de celda de María resulta ser Penélope, quien empieza a hacerle la vida miserable. Soraya trata de convencer a Luis Fernando que María y Nandito solo querían hacerle daño.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se encuentra muy agradecida con Jorge Luis, ya que, gracias a él, su hermano se ha recuperado del accidente. Jorge Luis se pelea con Santiago al escuchar las cosas que le dice a su padre.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Marimar planea humillar a Angélica a cambio de no enviar a Renato a la cárcel. Gema y Arturo le piden a Bella que sea madrina de su boda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella obliga a Angélica a sacar unos pagarés del lodo con los dientes, tal como se lo hizo ella alguna vez Angélica y Renato se enteran que Bella pagó la operación de su hijo.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María quiere divorciarse lo antes posible de Luis Fernando. Soraya continúa haciéndole la vida imposible a Alicia. María tiene un conflicto con Penélope al acusarla de robo. Luis Fernando se niega a darle el divorcio a María.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: El Dr. Durán invita a Juan Miguel a trabajar con él. Cande encuentra el joyero de Marichuy en la basura. Patricio le exige a Marichuy que se olvide de Juan Miguel. Ana Julia se lleva a Mayita sin avisar, dejando a todos muy angustiados.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia llega con Mayita y miente al decir que le había avisado a Cande. Las cirugías de Juan Miguel fracasan, pero el doctor Durán le pide que no se rinda. Ana Julia le miente a Juan Miguel y a Marichuy inventando romances para separarlos.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María va a buscar a Victoria para pedirle trabajo pero ella la trata muy mal María descubre que Max le mintió y que su nombre no es Fabián.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max sigue a María y le pide perdón por haberle mentido. Milagros ayudará a Nati a encontrar a su alma gemela. Antonieta le pide a María que se aleje de Max pues va a sufrir mucho. Max le dice a María que quiere estar con ella y la besa.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María le cuenta a Nati y Linda que Max solo quería tener intimidad con ella, pero que no la ama. Victoria le pregunta a Osvaldo si ha pensado en estar con otra mujer, él se molesta y le dice que no. Victoria se encela de Linda Sortini.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Bernarda le prohíbe a Tomasa decirle la verdad sobre Victoria a Juan Pablo. Osvaldo le pide a Victoria que piense un poco en lo que él quiere frente a la prensa. Max le pide perdón a María, la lleva a cenar y ella decide darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó: Dinero a salvo
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: El manantial: Declaración de guerra
programme.desc: Alfonsina descubre la puesta en escena de Gilberto en complicidad con Bárbara y habla con ella. Luego, ella tiene una cita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Momentos difíciles
programme.desc: Majo amenaza con matar a Darío. Elisa y Leonardo no pueden superar no estar juntos pero saben que la investigación los separa. Victoria enfrenta a Sonia y Fabricio besa a Elisa sorpresivamente.

programme.title: La Gata: Advertencia
programme.desc: Mariano habla con Lorenza y le dice que Esmeralda no es una mala mujer. Por otro lado, una compañera de Esmeralda le dice que tenga cuidado con su jefe.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Locura de amor
programme.desc: Vanesa le promete a Rogelio que cuidará de Cynthia para evitar que se mate. Mercedes le aconseja a Rocío que le dé a Esteban la oportunidad para enamorarla. Gustavo idea un plan para evitar que Cynthia continúe alterada.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Verdad descubierta
programme.desc: Alex le dice a María José que ya sabe la verdad sobre Meche y quiere denunciar a Bruno por soborno, pero ella se niega. Alex enfrenta a Pedro y Chucho por Meche.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Evitar una boda
programme.desc: Florencia le confiesa a Damián que no está embarazada. Damián decide buscar a Elisa para impedir que se case con Gael.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Justicia
programme.desc: Valentina se alegra al ver a Isabel en libertad. Toledo le pide a Ivana que le dé una oportunidad para enamorarla. Sandra y Felipe logran su sueño y se casan por la iglesia en compañía de familiares y amigos.

programme.title: XHDRBZ: Show interrumpido
programme.desc: La gente le hace preguntas a la licenciada Castañeda. El Súper Portero hace que Mara Patricia Castañeda salga de su programa furiosa debido a sus intervenciones.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano hace una reunión y le informa a los empleados que el hotel recibirá a una convención de cirqueros. El Vitor conoce a un payaso, él le cuenta la historia de su triste vida y Vitor decide ayudarlo siendo parte de su show.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cirpriano les dice a los empleados que tienen que desalojar el hotel porque lo van a renovar. Los empleados dicen que desempeñan muy bien su trabajo y que es injusto que no les paguen.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Natasha se encuentra con una presuntuosa y molesta excompañera de la escuela. Vítor y Albertano deciden hacer pasar a Natasha por una exitosa millonaria que vive rodeada de lujos y servidumbre para poner a la presumida en su lugar.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden que lo suyo es ser jefes, y por ello compran una fábrica para producir accesorios para automóvil.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa recomienda a su hermano Albertano para presentar el nuevo shampoo Placentex Antiesponge. Maria le plancha el uniforme de Elvis y provoca los celos de Doña Lucha, que se lo arruga.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: El Chino necesita visitar el Museo de Antropología e Historia para un trabajo de la escuela. María se ofrece a acompañarlo y compromete a Albertano a ir con ellos. Sin embargo, los jóvenes pasan una romántica tarde hasta que se acuerdan lo prometido.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Renata empieza a trabajar como vendedora de cosméticos porque está harta de que en la casa nadie ayude con la limpieza.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Gaby está triste porque Plutarco encontró trabajo como auxiliar de vuelo y se ausenta. Martina se pone a dieta y Alfonso encuentra una cadenita valiosa que trae problemas.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito se lleva el carro sin el permiso de Ludovico, lo choca y su padre deberá pagar la reparación. Ludoviquito comienza a robar partes de autos cuando su padre lo castiga.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico y Federica reciben una invitación para ir a una reunión de ex alumnos en la preparatoria. Federica le inventa a sus ex compañeras que Ludovico es un importante médico.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acepta a ir a terapia con mucha gente extraña por su adicción a las mujeres jóvenes. Miranda descubre que Paco les paga a mujeres jóvenes para tener intimidad con ellas.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco organiza una fiesta e invita a todas las mujeres que le gustan, pero ninguna asiste y termina borracho con los amigos de Toña.

programme.title: Vecinos: El simulacro
programme.desc: Los vecinos reaccionan como locos ante un sismo y solicitan un curso de evacuación a la delegación, ya que quieren estar preparados ante un evento así, lo que no se imaginan es que otro sismo está próximo y los pondrá a prueba.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco se lesiona y le pide a Alma que lo lleve con el médico. Alma se enfurece con Gandía al saber que fue destituida de su cuerpo de porristas. Martín se anuncia como el tutor del quinto grado.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Se alista la posada de Roberta. Gandía le da un regalo a Alicia. Tomás invita a Anita a la posada. Lola descubre que Santos no es su amigo secreto. Santos se le declara a Lupita, ella acepta, pero Nico llega inesperadamente a la posada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Es la cena de Navidad y Marina, la mamá de Mia, se presenta en casa de Franco para decirle toda la verdad. Rocco le dice a Mia que cree que el papá de Vico la golpea. Alma y Franco hablan de los problemas similares que tienen.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma le advierte a Reverte que no permitirá que le diga la verdad a Roberta y viajará con ellos. José le pide a Luciano que trabaje en una empresa para que investigue un asunto. Iñaki se burla de Diego.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel invita a Sabrina al Vacance Club Pilar y Sol pretenden saber cuál es el peor secreto de Mia para divulgarlo Diego le dice a Roberta que nunca pensó que se dejaría dominar Lupita no sabe si regresar con Nico o andar con Santos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Nico regresa de viaje, habla con Lupita para aclarar las cosas y le reclama por estar con otro. Los chicos se van de vacaciones para pasar Año Nuevo juntos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel invita a Sabrina a pasar fin de año con ellos en Valle. Roberta se encela de la hermana de Lupita pues sale con Diego. Mia prepara la reunión de los secretos con Vico y Celina, Pilar graba la conversación. Alma se queda con Franco.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sabrina le agradece a Miguel el tiempo que pasa con ella. Un ladrón roba la grabadora de Pilar, todos buscan al ladrón. Lola toma alcohol para demostrar que no es una niña. Roberta abofetea a Diego por emborrachar a Lola.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Federica es detenida por homicidio e intento de asesinato. Eloísa le dice a Gael que no lo quitará del testamento aunque no sea un Ángeles.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: El juez le dice a Federica que irá a la cárcel sin derecho a fianza. Por su lado, Eloísa le confiesa a Sergio que ella mató a Máximo. Pedro se alegra al enterarse que Fiorella es hija de Santino.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Amador le dice a su tía que no sabe dónde está Eduardito. Rafael le quiere decir a Marichuy que Juan Miguel le miente. Daniel le da una romántica sorpresa a Rocío en el bosque.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: La tía de Amador piensa que Amador regaló al bebé y la mamá de Eduardito enloquece. Adrián quiere adoptar al bebé que encontraron en la basura. Juan Miguel sale molesto de la casa de Ana Julia y se encuentra con Onelia.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia pasa la noche con Amador pero llega Juan Miguel. Ana Julia le dice a Cecilia que Juan Miguel la utilizó. Purita recibe la sorpresa del nuevo bebé. Marichuy sospecha que el doctor es Juan Miguel.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ana Julia y Amador planean hacerle daño a Rocío. Patricio quiere que Juan Miguel le diga a Marichuy que ya la van a operar, pero ella no quiere que sea el Dr. Cisneros. Juan Miguel quiere convencer a Cecilia que Ana Julia lo drogó.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Antonio le dice a Victoria que no le dejará la empresa a Bruno, pues no es un hombre responsable. En medio de una discusión con Bruno, Antonio sufre un accidente.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alex sufre un terrible accidente ocasionado por Bruno. Bruno le hace creer a Victoria que Alex se casó con una mujer llamada María José. Victoria le informa a María José que Alex está muerto.

programme.title: Mamá, soy Paquito
programme.desc: Paquito sufre la muerte de su madre a temprana edad, quedando a merced de la pobreza y la miseria.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma
programme.desc: José José muestra la realidad de la vida de una estrella y cómo la fama, el dinero, y los placeres pueden destruirlo.

programme.title: Hasta el viento tiene miedo
programme.desc: La decisión de un alma en pena de posesionar a una estudiante aterroriza a un internado de señoritas.

programme.title: Yambao
programme.desc: Una mujer indígena realiza un hechizo de amor, sobre el ingenuo dueño de una plantación cubana del siglo XIX.

programme.title: Paraíso robado
programme.desc: Una joven pierde la razón cuando se entera de que su tío y su novio murieron en un accidente de tren.

programme.title: En la palma de tu mano
programme.desc: Jaime Karín es un importante astrólogo que utiliza a su esposa, Clara, para obtener información de sus futuras clientas. Ada planea eliminar a su amante, le propone a Karín hacerlo juntos y compartir la herencia.

programme.title: Sublime melodía
programme.desc: Una joven viuda le pide a su suegra que cuide a su pequeña hija para que viva con el recuerdo de su padre.

programme.title: El vestido de novia
programme.desc: Un ingeniero lleva a una prostituta al campamento maderero donde trabaja y ambos fingen ser marido y mujer, pues solo se admiten empleados casados.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Donde fuego se hace, humo sale
programme.desc: Por culpa de la vida sexual de su padre, la madre, el novio y una compañera de la escuela de Margarita terminan contagiados de SIDA.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La novedad es flor de un día, hoy ya no luce lo que ayer lucía
programme.desc: Los celos de José Luis lo están alejando de Marieta y si no hace algo por cambiar, podría perderla para siempre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Al hombre osado la fortuna le da la mano
programme.desc: Amalia, Sebastián y Hernán son tres adolescentes que viven en hogares violentos y han aprendido que la violencia es algo cotidiano.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Si quieres conocer a Inés, vive con ella un mes
programme.desc: Una joven menosprecia a su madre y se obsesiona con el estilo de vida de su vecina al grado de que un día entra a su casa sin permiso. La joven descubre que la vida de su vecina no es tan grandiosa como ella pensaba.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Por la muestra se conoce el paño
programme.desc: Camila y Alexa son primas y su abuela tiene preferencia por una de ellas. Esto es culpa de sus madres, pues la madre de Camila le ha enseñado a ser presumida y grosera con su prima.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El hábito no hace al monje, pero lo distingue
programme.desc: Una joven tiene que vivir con su padre y su madrastra tras la muerte de su madre, su actitud frente a la vida es de sufrimiento y opta por no estudiar, ni trabajar, pero al conocer un joven que perdió las ganas de vivir, logrará ver la realidad.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Quien no cree a buena madre, cree a mala madrastra
programme.desc: Sonia es una mujer enamorada de Samuel él decide tener una relación con Vania, una mujer vividora que sólo lo quiere por su dinero y pretende robarle todo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale solo andar, que mal casar
programme.desc: Elena encuentra a su novio en la cama con otra mujer a pesar de eso, lo perdona y acepta casarse con él. Pero en una discusión, David la golpea. A partir de ese momento, las cosas empeoran.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La noche se engalana con la presencia el escenario de Lupita D'alessio. Montserrat interpreta el melodrama titulado, Telesa, con la participación especial de Angelique Boyer.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Un programa lleno de sorpresas, ya que las mamás de los participantes se unen a ellos en el escenario interpretando un popurrí. Como invitados especiales Manuel Mijares, Yuri, Aarón Díaz y un sketch cómico con Albertano, Doña Lucha y Rosa.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Ha Ash, Pandora y Omar Chaparro
programme.desc: Los invitados del grupo musical Ha Ash y Pandora además de un sketch cómico con Omar Chaparro. Se estrena la sección karaoke de las estrellas con Laura G y René Franco. En Telesa, la participación especial de Sebastián Rulli.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Sherlyn, Patricio Borghetti y Banda El Recodo
programme.desc: Bianca Marroquín presenta un fragmento de sus obras teatrales la Novicia Rebelde y Chicago junto a los pequeños. Sherlyn y Patricio Borghetti, se enfrentan en la prueba de karaoke de las estrellas. Finalmente un popurrí con la Banda el Recodo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Personas con capacidades diferentes cuentan sus historias de lo que ha sido viajar a bordo de 'La bestia'. Una esperanza de llegar a La Casa Blanca es lo que tienen 'los mutilados'.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.sub-title: How an Interior Designer Makes This 700-Square-Foot Living Room Feel Cozy
programme.desc: Undeterred, Emilie Munroe of San Francisco firm Studio Munroe set about making the massive space and adjoining vestibule more warm and inviting. Grounding colors set the tone: a deep sea blue on the walls, with inky black for the brick fireplace.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: This Small Media Room Is Full Of Hidden Storage
programme.desc: Wife-and-husband duo Heather and Matt French, of Santa Fe's French & French Interiors, splashed the media room in our home with bold pattern, dramatic color, and tons of texture, then crowned the design with a curtained trundle bed for drifting off into dreamland.

programme.title: Blank Slate
programme.sub-title: Watch This Spare Room Become a Swanky Home Bar
programme.desc: One too many doorways can turn a room into a de facto hallway that's passed through rather than used. But for this space that opens onto the media room and office in our home, Dallas-based designer Jean Liu of Jean Liu Design knew the perfect solution: an elevated sipping room with a fully operational wet bar.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's viewers love 5 ingredient recipes, so why not six? Her frittata has a secret ingredient – leftover spaghetti – with rich Brie and Bacon. You could save the spaghetti from another pasta favorite – Peppery Broccoli Pasta with Feta. Her Duck confit with Braised leeks and sauerkraut is nice enough for company. Plus, Sara answers a viewer's question about perfectly flattened chicken breasts.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Fall and winter holidays call for big celebrations and, of course, lots of baking! For Thanksgiving – Roasted Glazed Pears Topped with Shortbread Pecan brittle and Crème Fraiche. For Christmas Eve, a comforting Warm Chocolate Cheesecake. And for Christmas morning – Sticky Buns that are super quick because they don't require yeast. On Ask Sara, answers to a viewer's question about vanilla beans.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Meatballs are so universally beloved almost every culture has a version. In Catalonia, Sara joins local cook Juame Vidal to make Meatball tapas with Peas from his garden. Moroccan Meatball Tagine with Couscous is achievable at home with a slow cooker – master Michele Scicolone shows us how. Sara's got her take – meatballs with a spicy Tex-Mex kick.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: When it's hot and muggy outside Sara keeps things cool with three recipes made without turning on the oven. First, Cold Southwestern Gazpacho that uses summer's bounty from the garden. Grilled steak tops a cool mushroom and tomato salad, and then, a refreshing Watermelon Screwdriver.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara travels to the West Coast for some delectable California food. She visits a Sacramento farmer and joins him and a local chef to make sushi two ways. In Napa Sara discovers a book club with a difference – they only read cookbooks, and each make a dish from that month's selection. Sara makes Shrimp Tikka with Mango Chutney with a member to bring to the group's dinner party.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Quick to make and much beloved, tacos are a staple on the weekday dinner table. Sara has her own recipe for Duck Tacos, then travels to Miami to learn a Cuban taco mashup with blogger Patty Ruiz – Chicken Vaca Frita Tacos. Almost a taco but just as good – Sara's Nacho Pie.

programme.title: MIX

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: We reinvent the cocktail party, with the power of live fire to take finger food over the top with rum and citrus-glazed jumbo shrimp grilled on sugarcane, “finger-burner” lamb chops from Spain and Smoked Nectarine Bellinis to keep conversation flowing. Sommelier Kristine Bocchino shares suggestions for three great wines to serve at the party.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Melting pot extreme, when traditional American barbecue meets authentic ethnic grilling and it's happening across the United States and around the world. Cross-culture mashups, from California paella to a deli-inspired pork loin stuffed with pastrami and sauerkraut. Michelin-starred chef Josiah Citrin dazzles with aged, smoked-roasted duck at his restaurant, Charcoal Venice.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: One Good Turn. Rotisserie grilling or spit-roasting combines the smoky sear of grilling with the heat of roasting. Add 3 more benefits: basting, no flare-ups, and the fragrance of wood smoke. Game hens acquire golden, crackling-crisp skin. Spare ribs are given the huli-huli (turn-turn) treatment. Wings get a sweet-salty, lacquer-like glaze. Finally, a whole spinning, sugar-crusted pineapple.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Grilling 24/7. The world's pit masters, fire up grills, smokers, or wood-burning ovens for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and late night snacks. For breakfast, farm eggs grilled with Parmesan, and prosciutto. For lunch, pizzas from the Industrial Eats in Buellton, CA. Pastrami Beef Ribs make a spectacular supper, and midnight snack of smoky, salty South African Grilled Cheese sandwiches.

programme.title: Wildest Places S02 E03

programme.title: Wildest Places S03 E01

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Heavy Hitters
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: The Brink
programme.desc: THE BRINK follows Steve Bannon for a year leading up to the 2018 mid-term elections in the United States, shedding light on his efforts to mobilize and unify far-right parties in order to win seats in the May 2019 European Parliamentary elections. To maintain his power and influence, the former Goldman Sachs banker and media investor reinvents himself — as he has many times before — this time as the self-appointed leader of a global populist movement. A keen manipulator of the press and gifted self-promoter, Bannon continues to draw headlines and protests wherever he goes, feeding the powerful myth on which his survival relies. Directed by Alison Klayman.

programme.title: American Dharma
programme.desc: Errol Morris turns his lens on Stephen K. Bannon. In a 16-hour interview, Morris questions him about his background, values, world view and his current feelings about Trump. Directed by Errol Morris.

programme.title: Soros
programme.desc: Billionaire activist George Soros is one of the most influential and controversial figures of our time. He is maligned by ideologues on both the left and the right for daring to tackle the world's problems. With unprecedented access to the man and his inner circle, director Jesse Dylan follows Soros and pulls back the curtain on his personal history, private wealth, and public activism.

programme.title: Rigged: The Voter Suppression Playbook
programme.desc: Narrated by Jeffrey Wright, Rigged chronicles how our right to vote is being undercut by a decade of dirty tricks – including the partisan use of gerrymandering and voter purges, and the gutting of the Voting Rights Act by the Supreme Court. The film captures real-time voter purges in North Carolina and voter intimidation in Texas. Directed by Michael Kasino.

programme.desc: Uncommon and hardly known, today the Dugong is the most threatened sea mammal on the planet. The species can only be found in certain parts of the Indian Ocean and in the western regions of the Pacific. Off the coast of Mozambique, in the Bazaruto archipelago, Karen is on a mission to monitor this species and implement policies to bring it back from the brink of extinction.

programme.title: Saving Paradise

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: Anna and the Thresher Sharks (The Philippines)
programme.desc: On the island of Malapascua in the Philippines, Anna Oposa and her team are working with local fisherman to create a nature reserve where thresher sharks can thrive. These sharks are famous for their long tails which they use to whip and stun their prey. Every day, pelagic thresher sharks head to Monad Shoal, a sunken island just off the coast of Malapascua, where other fish “clean” them of their external parasites. This remarkable sight is popular with divers but the numbers of thresher sharks are dwindling and Anna is spearheading the campaign to protect this incredible species in the Philippines.

programme.desc: You won't just laugh out loud -- these speakers will make you think twice. 1) The perks of being a pirate | Tom Nash 2) How to make a sad story funny | Jodie Houlston-Lau 3) How I made friends with reality | Emily Levine 4) Why is Aristophanes called "The Father of Comedy"? - Mark Robinson 5) What I've learned about parenting as a stay-at-home dad | Glen Henry 6) How does alcohol make you drunk?

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: What does it take to have a good life? Science and advice on how to live well, find meaning and be happy. 1) Why having fun is the secret to a healthier life | Catherine Price 2) The philosophy of cynicism - William D. Desmond 3) How cohousing can make us happier (and live longer) | Grace Kim 4) Why do our bodies age? | Monica Menesini 5) What really matters at the end of life | BJ Miller

programme.title: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
programme.desc: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous

programme.title: Fight To Survive | Lightning Strike
programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: It's man versus nature in a race against time. Heart-pounding rescues captured on camera in these viral weather videos.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.4
programme.desc: Get ready to witness the mistakes and mischiefs of our wild friends

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.5
programme.desc: Birds of a feather flock together

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
programme.desc: Having witnessed the ravages of a deadly tornado just a few days earlier, on the last day of their chase the storm hunters are again shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fire and Water
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the worlds hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Shades of Red
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades of Red (S1E3) — Explore a vibrant, passionate art collection where the color red takes center stage. The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Shades Of Orange
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E5: Shades of Orange — Celebrating the warm and vibrant tones of orange, utilizing a variety of mediums to create a sense of energy, passion, and warmth.

programme.title: Shades Of Yellow
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E6: Shades Of Yellow — Capturing the brightness and joyfulness of yellow through various hues and textures, evoking a sense of warmth, optimism, and playfulness.

programme.title: Shades of Color: Shades of Green
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E2: Shades of Green — Explore a stunning art collection celebrating the color green. From lush landscapes to abstract works, this collection showcases the versatility and serenity of green in a myriad of artistic expressions.

programme.title: Shades of Blue
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence. Through a masterful interplay of tones and textures, each piece evokes a profound sense of serenity, depth, & contemplation. Immerse yourself in a journey of introspection.

programme.title: Shades of Purple
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E7: Shades of Purple — Celebrating the richness and diversity of purple, with vibrant hues and bold compositions that evoke a sense of regal elegance and mystery.

programme.title: Shades of Pink
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E4: Shades of Pink — Showcasing the gorgeous yet delicate energy of pink, utilizing shades ranging from soft blush to bright fuchsia to evoke a sense of sweetness, romance, and vibrancy.
